name: Hotshot
description: Every interaction is a game, every conversation a potential score. You've learned to read people, to find the angle, to turn nothing into something. Survival is an art, and you're a master con artist.

feats.name: Red-handed
feats.description: Once per **Long Rest**, when you or an ally would fail a skill check related to **Deception** or **Persuasion**, you may force them to make an opposing **Mind** or **Will** check against your **defenses**.
